NOTE: the many int()/float()-coerced keys with a plain STRING-LITERAL default (e.g. int(os.getenv(K,\"16384\"))) were excluded from the computed-default category: identical-literal ones are already registry-eligible via resolve(), and divergent-literal ones (PG_FETCH_CONCURRENCY, PG_MIN_EVIDENCE_PER_SECTION, PG_FAITHFULNESS_NLI_THRESHOLD, etc.) are the 20 already-tracked conflicting-default keys in config_conflicts.md, out of scope. Recommendation: a surgical 3-accessor change (typed getters that own each computed default once), NOT a blanket 46-key migration.
